matchedFacts: POST /mcp/v1/translate accepts a vector plus source_dimension and target_dimension.
Example payload uses vector [0.91,0.42,-0.18,0.07] and translates from 4d to 2d.
Example result returns translated_vector [0.91,0.42] with method truncation and retention 0.5.

payload.answer:
- POST /mcp/v1/translate accepts a vector plus source_dimension and target_dimension.
- Source profile example: openai text-embedding-3-large 1536d.
- Target profile example: cloudflare bge-base-en-v1.5 768d.
- Example payload uses vector [0.91,0.42,-0.18,0.07] and translates from 4d to 2d.
- Example result returns translated_vector [0.91,0.42] with method truncation and retention 0.5.
